title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, March 15 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 15/03/2022
Image reference: 2022-03-15_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-march-15-2022_img1.png
Tanker: Tanker values have firmed. VLCC Eneos Tokyo (301,000 DWT, Jul 2004, IHI) sold to Chinese buyers for USD 30.50 mil, VV value USD 27.98 mil - On Subs, DD Due. Suezmax Densa Orca (158,300 DWT, Apr 2012, Hyundai Heavy Ind) sold to Delta Tankers for USD 33.50 mil, VV value USD 32.14 mil - SS/DD Due.
